changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-merge/src/yaml.rs:113-133

`fn latest_value_timestamps(entries: &[ChangelogEntry]) -> HashMap<String, (String, String)>`

Builds a map of field name to (most recent value, timestamp). Tested only indirectly through conflict resolution tests. Needs direct tests for:
- Empty entries list
- Multiple entries touching the same field (later timestamp wins)
- Multiple fields across entries
- Entries without `new_value` (should be ignored) #coverage-gap
